rationale.R1.2: The passage chains several load-bearing logical steps—sample diversity justifies plurality aggregation, interval disagreement implies low confidence, K-saturation implies diminishing returns—each of which could be checked if the ask is technical review.
rationale.R1.3: Specific quantitative claims are asserted against a named real dataset (ERCOT 2023): 6.4% revenue gain over deterministic MILP, 11.2% CVaR-95 reduction over Bertsimas-Sim, <0.4% degradation increase. Checking whether stated results actually support those headlines is a natural reading of 'take a look' on a results-heavy passage.
rationale.R1.6: The most common interpretation of an open-ended 'take a look at this paragraph' on prose is writing-quality feedback—clarity, sentence structure, register, and flow—making R1.6 plausibly load-bearing.
